Repeatable to: 8 credits.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

VMSC689 Use of Genomics and Proteomics in Infectious Disease (3 Credits)

Focus is placed on current biotechnological development and recent research breakthroughs in the field of genomics and proteomics as it relates to infectious disease and drug/vaccine development. Recommended: BCHM463; and (BSCI330 or BSCI230); or by permission. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
